# Evergreen Wealth Track

> Calm, India-first personal finance web app: expense tracking in INR with multi-currency support, budgeting, SIP and compound-interest calculators, subscription planning, and honest curated finance reading.

## About
- Name: Evergreen Wealth Track
- Website: https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app
- Purpose: Help individuals in India track money, plan budgets, and grow savings without dark patterns or noise.
- Audience: Individuals and households in India who want a simple, private money tool.

## Public sections
- Home: https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app/
- How it works: https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app/how-it-works
- Blog (Why Evergreen): https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app/blog
- Security overview: https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app/security
- Sign in: https://solace-nest-scribe.lovable.app/auth

## Authenticated features (require sign-in)
- Dashboard, Expenses, Budget, Calculator (SIP + compound), Subscriptions / plans, Profile.

## Principles
- Bank-grade row-level security; no re-selling of user data.
- INR-first with multi-currency conversion.
- No dark patterns, no manipulative upsells.

## Contact
- Product feedback and support: via the in-app chat widget or the contact form on the site.
